name: Owner Maintenance Approval
description: Prepare owner approval packets for maintenance spend, capture decisions, and record approval audit details.

stages.name: Scope Approval Need
stages.description: Determine whether the maintenance item requires owner approval and what facts are needed.

steps.title: Assess approval threshold
steps.instructions: Assess estimated cost, urgency, owner threshold, habitability impact, warranty status, and prior authorization to decide whether owner approval is required.

steps.title: Collect bid and evidence
steps.instructions: Collect vendor estimate, diagnostic notes, photos, resident impact, alternatives, and timing risk for the approval packet.

stages.name: Prepare Owner Packet
stages.description: Draft and review the owner decision packet before release.

steps.title: Draft owner maintenance packet
steps.instructions: Draft the owner packet with recommendation, estimate, options, deadline, risks of delay, and decline-reason capture requirements.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft internal owner maintenance approval packet; no outbound send.

steps.title: Review approval packet
steps.instructions: Confirm the packet is accurate, neutral, compliant, and ready for owner-facing approval routing.
steps.human_prompt: Review owner maintenance approval packet before release.

stages.name: Capture Decision
stages.description: Wait for owner decision, then record and route the result.

steps.title: Owner approval gate
steps.instructions: Do not proceed until approve, edit, decline, or cancel is captured with source and timestamp. Declines require a reason.
steps.human_prompt: Owner approval decision required before maintenance spend is authorized.

steps.title: Record maintenance approval outcome
steps.instructions: Record decision source, approval scope, spend cap, decline reason if present, and next workflow state.
steps.dispatch_body: Record owner maintenance approval decision metadata.
